steps.title: Test the correct point
steps.content: For choice D, $(6,0)$, the first inequality gives $0\le6+12$, or $0\le18$, which is true.

steps.title: Check the second inequality
steps.content: The second inequality gives $0\ge-3(6)-12$, or $0\ge-30$, which is also true.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Since $(6,0)$ satisfies both inequalities, D is correct. The other points each fail at least one of the two inequalities.
